ddt:Target.Name: ABSESCAPB - XEF Version 1.7
ddt:Target.Description:
ABS/ESP/APB GEN09 (Projet XEF) ***** RSC Pilot : Ayoub BELLALI (+33-1-768-40277)
V1.7 - PartNumber.BasicPartList data update
V1.6 - DTC list update
V1.5 - Screens update - Requests update
V1.4 - Screens update
V1.3 - Update of Reference parameters - Update of DTCs list - Update MMI Maintenance Mode
V1.2 - Screens update : Evacuation/Filling
V1.1 - DTC update - Requests update - Screens adding
V1.0 - Creation from ABSESC___X10527998_Version_3.1

Item.Text: FM (Freq Mod) / PWM (Pulse Width Mod) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Freq Mod) / PWM (Pulse Width Mod) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or operation obstructed or blocked
Invalid ABS or ESC calibration parameter
Cluster sensor (Ax, Ay, Yaw Rate sensors)
Lost of Communication with EG Switch

Item.Text: Routine completed and OK or ready to start
Routine interrompue par l'outils de diagnostic
CAN - TPI, reduced data, no cog + Renault dev frame

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: OK - This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: Routine.Erase Steering Wheel angle Sensor offset.start
Routine.Erase Steering Wheel angle Sensor offset.status request
Routine.Erase Master Cylinder pressure sensor offset.start
Routine.Erase Lateral acceleration sensor offset.status request
Routine.Erase Master Cylinder pressure sensor offset.status request
Routine.Erase Longitudinal acceleration sensor offset.status request
OutputControl.Repair bleeding.FRRRInlet_ElecShuttlesAndPump
Request.Comment: OK - (FR EV + RR EV+ 2 HSV+ Pump)

Request.Name: OutputControl
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Device.Name: Invalid ABS or ESC calibration parameter
Lost of Communication with EG Switch

Test.Description: The APB button signal shows lock or release for too long time (default time: 5min)
Failure in the electrical connection of APB button detected.
ECU Undervoltage causes Undervoltage of APB-Button input circuitry
A short circuit between the lines of the left APB motor was detected by the hardware .
Left APB Motor lines have a short circuit to ground.
Left APB Motor lines have a short circuit to UBatt.
Left APB Motor lines have an interruption.
Possibly a short circuit of the motor lines or wrongly actuated motor.
APB leftADC failure.
Failure in left APB Motor H-bridge during Initial or Cyclic Motor Enable Test (IMET/CMET).
The current measured in the two shunts of the H-bridge are not equal.

The MGU current is checked permanently. A too high temperature must be avoided to protect the power stage. With a temperature model the heat up and cool down behaviour is estimated. If the estimated temperature is beyond a critical threshold then a failure message is generated. During a motor stall the temperature increases rapidely that means that a MGU is switched off after a short time.

The MGU current is checked permanently. A too high temperature must be avoided to protect the power stage. With a temperature model the heat up and cool down behaviour is estimated. If the estimated temperature is beyond a critical threshold then a failure message is generated. During a motor stall the temperature increases rapidely that means that a MGU is switched off after a short time.

If a request for MGU activation is detected then the monitoring checks the polarity of the MGU voltage during the complete actuation cycle. Failure is set if the power stage polarity is incorect or the current is below a threshold for a defined duration.
A short circuit between the lines of the left APB motor was detected by the hardware .
Right APB Motor lines have a short circuit to ground.
Right APB Motor lines have a short circuit to UBatt.
Right APB Motor lines have an interruption.
Possibly a short circuit of the motor lines or wrongly actuated motor.
APB rightADC failure.
Failure in right APB Motor H-bridge during Initial or Cyclic Motor Enable Test (IMET/CMET).
The current measured in the two shunts of the H-bridge are not equal.

The MGU current is checked permanently. A too high temperature must be avoided to protect the power stage. With a temperature model the heat up and cool down behaviour is estimated. If the estimated temperature is beyond a critical threshold then a failure message is generated. During a motor stall the temperature increases rapidely that means that a MGU is switched off after a short time.

The MGU current is checked permanently. A too high temperature must be avoided to protect the power stage. With a temperature model the heat up and cool down behaviour is estimated. If the estimated temperature is beyond a critical threshold then a failure message is generated. During a motor stall the temperature increases rapidely that means that a MGU is switched off after a short time.

If a request for MGU activation is detected then the monitoring checks the polarity of the MGU voltage during the complete actuation cycle. Failure is set if the power stage polarity is incorect or the current is below a threshold for a defined duration.
Actuation movement observed by electrical measurements is not plausible. Left actuator.
Actuation took too long.
Motor over-current.
Actuation interrupted because of missing Host availability in the required direction.
Current reading too low during a maneuver.
Actuation movement observed by electrical measurements is not plausible. Right actuator.
Actuation took too long.
Motor over-current.
Actuation interrupted because of missing Host availability in the required direction.
Current reading too low during a maneuver.
One or both actuators are in unknown state.
The caliper(s) have exceeded the number of actuations expected in its (their) expected lifetime.
A safety failure occurred which led the system to irreversible safe state.
The safety monitoring module detected a recoverable failure.
Set when the vehicle variant information passed via PbcIn.VariantItem has assumed an invalid value or has changed at run-time.
The system has issued a roll-away re-clamp maneuver due to detection of a non-zero wheel speed.
Actuation interrupted because of low Supply Voltage.
Actuation interrupted because of high Supply Voltage.
CAN frame HFM_CANHS_R_01 (0x303) has been received with a DLC shorter than 7 bytes for at least 500 ms.
An invalid/undefined value (0x00x3/NOTDEF) for the CAN signal DriverSeatStatus_HFM in frame HFM_CANHS_R_01 (0x303) has been received for at least 500 ms.
CAN frame HFM_CANHS_R_01 (0x303) could not be received for at least 500 ms.
CAN frame AIRBAG_CANHS_R_01 (0x653) has been received with a DLC shorter than 4 bytes for at least 500 ms.
An invalid/undefined value (0x3/NOTDEF) for the CAN signal Driver_SBR in frame AIRBAG_CANHS_R_01 (0x653) has been received for at least 500 ms.
CAN frame AIRBAG_CANHS_R_01 (0x653) could not be received for at least 500 ms.

Device.Name: Cluster sensor (Ax, Ay, Yaw Rate sensors)

Test.Description: Button alternatively pressed and not pressed within a short period/Button pressed during a too long time

Label.Text: WARNING: To calibrate the cluster, the vehicle must be on a reference flat surface

Display.DataName: Function status.ASR function.inhibition by diag status
Function status.ASR function.inhibition by switch status
Function status.AYC function.inhibition by diag status
Function status.AYC function.inhibition by switch status
Function status.EBP function.inhibition by diag status
Function status.HDC function.inhibition by diag status
Function status.HDC function.inhibition by switch status
Function status.EG function.inhibition by diag status

Label.Text: Press the gaz pedal and reach the engine RPM between 2000 rpm and 3000 rpm. Then, start the ASR control.
Discharge of the accumulator chamber (after the filling)
(to be actuated every 2s until the system is completely evacuated)
(to be actuated every 2s as long as the systemp is completely filled)
Repair bleed procedure - Secondary circuit bleeding procedure
-0-1- Place the device providing 2bar of pressure in the reservoir With No Brake Pedal Pressed
-1-1- Open the bleeder screw at the Rear Left wheel
-1-3- Start the RL bleeding procedure and wait 25s
-1-4- When there is no more air bubble, close the bleeding screw and go to step 2
The device must remain on the reservoir during the entire bleeding procedure
-2-1- Open the bleeder screw at the Front Left wheel
-3-3- Start the FR bleeding procedure and wait for 110s
-2-4- When there is no more air bubble, close the bleeding screw and go to step 3
-3-1- Open the bleeder screw at the Front Right wheel
-2-3- Start the FL bleeding procedure and wait for 25s
-3-4- When there is no more air bubble, close the bleeding screw and go to step 4
-4-4- When there is no more air bubble, close the bleeding screw and then stop the bleeding
-4-1- Open the bleeder screw at the Rear Right wheel
-4-3- Start the RR bleeding procedure and wait for 86s
- STEP5 - => END OF THE BLEEDING PROCEDURE
-5-1- Remove the device on the brake fluid reservoir
A reset of the totalizer odometer is only allowed if:
- Totalizer odometer has not been reset more than 2 times

Send.RequestName: Routine.Erase Steering Wheel angle Sensor offset.start

Input.RequestName: Routine.Erase Steering Wheel angle Sensor offset.start

Label.Text: Hydraulic valves and pump control - permanent activation (90 sec.)

Input.DataName: Hydraulic valves and pump.outlet EV RR
Hydraulic valves and pump.inlet EV RR
Hydraulic valves and pump.outlet EV RL
Hydraulic valves and pump.inlet EV RL
Hydraulic valves and pump.outlet EV FR
Hydraulic valves and pump.intlet EV FR
Hydraulic valves and pump.outlet EV FL
Hydraulic valves and pump.inlet EV FL
Hydraulic valves and pump.FL RR Electric shuttle EV
Hydraulic valves and pump.FR RL Electric shuttle EV
Hydraulic valves and pump.FL RR Isolating EV
Hydraulic valves and pump.FR RL Isolating EV

Label.Text: 1- Select the wheel to check (the wheel speed sensor shall not be in failure)
96 poles are detected --> No tone failure
2- Turn the wheel selected to do exactly 1 wheel revolution without coming back in inverse rotation direction
Less than 96 poles (result is pair) --> Tone must be replaced
More than 96 poles --> The control routine has failed, try again from step 1
3- Stop the routine or select another wheel from step 1
Number of poles is impair --> Re perform the counting from step 1
-1- This screen shall be used to measure the consumption peak and max value during an ABS braking control
-2- Connect the measurement device to the ECU and click on the START button.
-3- When the measurment is finished, click on STOP
NOTE: The control will automatically stop after a 30s continuous activation of the relays
2 - Maintenance mode to fully release parking brakes
3 - After replacing the pads, perform an Assembly check :
